zh.Flamborough, Yorkshire East Riding, Engl: 英國英格蘭越可爾 易亞斯特 利丁福藍波洛
zh.lifeSummary: 當Sir Marmaduke Constable II於大約1381年出生在英國越可爾福藍波洛時，他的父親Robert Constable V30歲，母親Margaret Skipwith23歲。他和Catherine Cumberworth至少有5個兒子和1個女兒。他去世於1404年8月5日之前在他的家鄉，埋葬在英國越可爾福藍波洛。

zh-hans.Flamborough, Yorkshire East Riding, Engl: 英国英格兰越可爾 易亞斯特 利丁福藍波洛
zh-hans.lifeSummary: 当Sir Marmaduke Constable II于大约1381年出生在英国越可爾福藍波洛时，他的父亲Robert Constable V30岁，母亲Margaret Skipwith23岁。他和Catherine Cumberworth至少有5个儿子和1个女儿。他去世于1404年8月5日之前在他的家乡，埋葬在英国越可爾福藍波洛。

nameMeanings.name: Constable
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of American Family Names © Patrick Hanks 2003, 2006.
meanings: English (southeastern): occupational name for the law-enforcement officer of a parish, from Middle English, Old French conestable, cunestable, from Late Latin comes stabuli ‘officer of the stable’. The title was also borne by various other officials during the Middle Ages, including the chief officer of a household or court, or a military officer, and this may in some cases be the source of the surname.
Americanized form of Dutch Constapel, an occupational name for the chief gunner aboard a ship or in the garrison of a fort.

variants.name: Costabile
meanings: Some characteristic forenames:  Italian Aldo, Antonio, Ciro, Nino, Agnese, Angelo, Duilio, Enrico, Ercole, Franco, Palma.
occupational name from medieval Greek kontostablēs ‘chamberlain’, from medieval Latin comes stabuli, literally ‘count of the stable’ (see Constable ).

nameMeanings.name: Marmaduke
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of First Names © Patrick Hanks and Flavia Hodges 1990, 2003, 2006.
meanings: Of uncertain derivation. It is generally held to be an Anglicized form of the Old Irish name Mael-Maedóc ‘devotee of Maedóc’. The name Maedóc was borne by various early Irish saints, most notably a 6th-century abbot of Clonmore and a 7th-century bishop of Ferns. Mael-Maedóc Ó Morgair ( 1095–1148 ) was a reformer of the Church in Ireland and a friend of Bernard of Clairvaux. However, the modern Gaelic form (from c.1200 ) is Maol-Maodhóg (pronounced ‘mul-may-og’), so that the name would have had to have been borrowed into English before this loss of the d. Marmaduke has never been common except in Yorkshire, where for example it was bourne by Marmaduke Huby , abbot of Fountains, ( 1495–1526 ). Its most notable bearer in recent times has been Marmaduke Hussey ( 1923–2006 ), a former chairman of the governors of the BBC.

historicEvents.title: Wycliffe's Bible
historicEvents.description: John Wycliffe, English theologian and professor at the University of Oxford, completed a translation of the Bible from the Latin Vulgate into Middle English. This translation is known as Wycliffe's Bible and was completed around 1382.

en.lifeSummary: When Sir Marmaduke Constable II was born about 1381, in Flamborough, Yorkshire, England, his father, Robert Constable V, was 30 and his mother, Margaret Skipwith, was 23. He had at least 5 sons and 1 daughter with Catherine Cumberworth. He died before 5 August 1404, in his hometown, and was buried in Flamborough, Yorkshire, England.

fr.lifeSummary: Lorsque Sir Marmaduke Constable II est né environ 1381, à Flamborough, Everwyck, Angleterre, son père, Robert Constable V, avait 30 ans et sa mère, Margaret Skipwith, avait 23 ans. Il a eu au moins 5 fils et 1 fille avec Catherine Cumberworth. Il est décédé avant 5 août 1404, dans sa ville natale, et a été enterré à Flamborough, Everwyck, Angleterre.

de.Flamborough, Yorkshire East Riding, Engl: Flamborough, Yorkshire East Riding, England, United Kingdom
de.lifeSummary: Als Sir Marmaduke Constable II um 1381 in Flamborough, Yorkshire, England geboren wurde, war sein Vater Robert Constable V 30 und seine Mutter Margaret Skipwith 23. Er hatte mit Catherine Cumberworth mindestens 5 Söhne und 1 Tochter. Er starb vor 5. August 1404 in seinem Geburtsort und wurde in Flamborough, Yorkshire, England begraben.

Lui avuto almeno 5 figli e 1 figlia con Catherine Cumberworth. Morì prima del 5 agosto 1404, nel sua cittadina, e fu sepolto a Flamborough, Yorkshire, England.

ja.lifeSummary: Sir Marmaduke Constable IIが約1381年にイギリスヨークシュアイアフランボロウで生まれた時，父Robert Constable Vは30歳，母Margaret Skipwithは23歳であった。彼はCatherine Cumberworthとの間に少なくとも5人の息子と1人の娘をもうけた。彼は1404年8月5日以前に故郷で死去し，イギリスヨークシュアイアフランボロウにて埋葬された。

ko.Flamborough, Yorkshire East Riding, Engl: 영국 잉글랜드 요르크실르 이스트 리딩 플램루
ko.lifeSummary: Sir Marmaduke Constable II(이)가 대략 1381년 영국 요르크실르 플램루에서 태어났을 때, 그의 아버지 Robert Constable V(은)는 30세였고, 그의 어머니 Margaret Skipwith(은)는 23세였다. 그는 Catherine Cumberworth(와)과 적어도 다섯 명의 아들과 한 명의 딸을 두었다. 그는 1404년 8월 5일 이전 그의 고향에서 사망했으며 영국 요르크실르 플램루에 묻혔다.

pt.lifeSummary: Quando Sir Marmaduke Constable II nasceu aproximadamente 1381, em Flamborough, Yorkshire, Inglaterra, seu pai, Robert Constable V, tinha 30 anos e sua mãe, Margaret Skipwith, tinha 23 anos. Ele teve pelo menos 5 filhos e 1 filha com Catherine Cumberworth. Ele faleceu antes 5 de agosto de 1404, em sua cidade natal, e foi sepultado em Flamborough, Yorkshire, Inglaterra.

ru.Flamborough, Yorkshire East Riding, Engl: флэмбороую, еркшир эаст ридинг, Англия, Великобритания
ru.lifeSummary: Когда Sir Marmaduke Constable II родился около 1381 г. в местности флэмбороую, еркшир, Англия, его отцу по имени Robert Constable V было 30 лет, а матери, которую звали Margaret Skipwith, 23. У него было по крайней мере 5 сыновей и 1 дочь от Catherine Cumberworth. Он умер перед 5 августа 1404 г. в его родном городе и был похоронен в местности флэмбороую, еркшир, Англия.
